_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide input to training and mitigation plan based on advancements in hardware and software technologies (e.g. attend training or conferences, reading) and their potential implications.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.487), AI-S-017 (AI, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.305). Shared vocabulary: [plan]. DCWF-only terms [advancements, attend, based, conferences, hardware, implications] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.855, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:57.7%, C:41.9%). No dominant classification for "Provide input to training and mitigation plan based on advancements in hardware" vs "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.505 > STS 0.305 (gap +0.200). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [plan] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.9%. Shared tokens: [plan]. DCWF-only: [advancements, attend, based, conferences, hardware, implications]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.200 with low STS 0.305. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
